'''Arf''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] serving under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Grov Bricker]] of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship ''[[Mourning Glory]]''.<ref name="Wizards" />
